title: Khaitan & Co acts on Constelli $20 million Series A fundraise
description: Constelli Signals Private Limited has raised $20 million from a Series A fundraise led by General Catalyst, with participation from 360 One Asset Management and existing investor Pravega Ventures.Khaitan & Co advised lead investor General Catalyst on their ~$14 million investment in Constelli.The core transaction team consisted of Bharat Anand (Senior Partner), Nidhi Killawala (Partner), Anupama Singh (Principal Associate), Shatakshi Gupta (Senior Associate) and Mohammad Kaif (Associate) wit
